subject: Diet, microbiome and inflammatory disease: April's top articles
body:
To ensure you receive emails from Faculty of 1000, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  April 2014 

-----------------------------------------------------

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
 Free access to recommendations of top-ranking articles    
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

We recently launched 'F1000 most influential' [ http://blog.f1000.com/tag/most-influential/ ], listing and providing free access to top-scoring article recommendations in selected Faculties. In February we covered Molecular Medicine, and the recommendations are free to read from our blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/2014/02/27/f1000prime-most-influential-molecular-medicine-2013/ ]. Head of Faculty for Critical Care & Emergency Medicine Prof Jean-Louis Vincent said that F1000Prime was bringing important research rapidly to the attention of those who need it when commenting on the most influential articles in his field, which were announced in March [ http://blog.f1000.com/2014/03/18/f1000prime-most-influential-critical-care-emergency-medicine/ ]. 


   F1000Prime                                
==================

1,124 recommendations [ http://bit.ly/1fGszrG ] added in the past 30 days*. Below is a selection:

Fiber intake influences allergic airway disease    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718228193?key=Pp0wzYxpMD29eVK ]   
This article beautifully illustrates the link between diet, the gut microbiome and the inflammatory response - in this instance, in a model of allergic airway disease.   
Trompette A, Gollwitzer ES, Yadava K et al. Nat Med. 2014; 20:159-66   

Dangerous climate change   
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718198740?key=XWzQU59dsj4Kf7j ]   
What are the emission reductions needed to stabilize climate and avoid potentially disastrous impacts on today's young people, future generations, and nature?   
Hansen J, Kharecha P, Sato M et al. PLoS ONE. 2013; 8:e81648

CRISPR-Cas9 screening -- powerful potential    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718206642?key=6QQlam1RLFYDwyk ]   
This article, published back to back with an article by Wang et al. [ http://f1000.com/prime/718206644?key=f4WyBuPikdDawFw ], uses the exciting application of the CRISPR-Cas9 system for genetic screens, which can either positively or negatively select human cells, including cancerous and pluripotent stem cells.   
Shalem O, Sanjana NE, Hartenian E et al. Science. 2014; 343:84-7

*Accurate at the time of writing.


 F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Treatment advances in systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/m/6/21 ]   
Inhibitors of the cytokines IL-1 and IL-6 have been remarkably effective in treating systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis.   
F1000Prime Report by Beukelman T [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/499999771097528206 ].   
F1000Prime Rep 2014, 6:21


 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 ---------------   


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 F1000 on the road    
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Over the next few weeks, we'll be presenting our products in different cities across the world and attending a number of conferences:

April 9: New England Area Librarian E-science Symposium

April 14-16: UKSG 2014 (Booth: 44)

April 26-30: Experimental Biology (Booth: 716) 



   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open access journal [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:  

RESEARCH ARTICLE   
Policies to increase the social value of science and the scientist satisfaction. An exploratory survey among Harvard bioscientists. [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-20/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2iq ]   
Latest Published: 21 Jan 2014   
Ballabeni A, Boggio A and Hemenway D et al.   
F1000Research 3:20   

COMMENTARY    
Software Carpentry: lessons learned [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-62/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2x7 ]   
Latest Published: 19 Feb 2014   
Wilson G   
F1000Research 3:62   

RESEARCH ARTICLE   
Modeling enzootic raccoon rabies from land use patterns - Georgia (USA) 2006-2010 [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-285/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/34t ]
Published: 27 Dec 2013   
Duke JE, Blanton JD, Ivey M et al.   
F1000Research 2:285   

RESEARCH ARTICLE   
Rapid and inexpensive body fluid identification by RNA profiling-based multiplex High Resolution Melt (HRM) analysis [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-281/v2 [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/314 ]   
Latest Published: 26 Feb 2014     
Hanson EK and Ballantyne J   
F1000Research 2:281   

~~~~~~~~~
Visit us at EB 2014!   
~~~~~~~~~   
F1000Research is attending the Experimental Biology Meeting in San Diego this month. Visit us in the exhibit hall at Booth 716 to find out more about the journal, and to pick up an invitation to our local meet-up event for researchers on April 28.


 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ----------------------------------------------
 

    
    F1000Posters                 
======================
 
Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below are a few selections:

* PUBLIC HEALTH *   
Android based data collection in a nutritional survey: a feasibility study in Chad 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1095068 ]   
Broillet F, Rossel L.   
F1000Posters 2014, 5:109  


* COMPUTATIONAL BIOLOGY *  
 
TGAC Browser: visualisation solutions for big data in the genomic era 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1095067 ]      
Thanki A, Bian X, Davey R.   
F1000Posters 2013, 5:111  


 ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
 ---------------------------------------------- 


  
----------------------

 * F1000Tips *

Follow @F1000Tips on Twitter [ http://twitter.com/f1000tips ] for tips, tricks, and customer support for all Faculty of 1000 service.

---------------------- 

-----------------------------------------------------   

In addition to this Monthly Update, we also send out emails featuring deals and discounts for registered users. To sign up, registered users should visit MyF1000 via any F1000 product and opt-in to receive "Information from F1000 about special offers" (under Email Alerts).

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group  
Registered in England and Wales with Company Number 3739756    
Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street | London, W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
